scope: cohort-eval report shape guard plus manifest qrel checksum refresh
learner_facing_quality_improvement: The 94.0 cohort gate now tells us immediately when a lane summary JSON is passed instead of a real cohort-eval baseline, and the manifest once again tracks the live 200-query fixture so learner-facing regression checks run against the current suite.
notes: This wave stayed inside lane-local verifier, tests, manifest metadata, and a report artifact.
The report guard prevents low-signal query_count/metadata errors when the supplied JSON is a migration wave note rather than a cohort-eval baseline.
